name: Orchha Heritage Town
description: A frozen-in-time medieval town on the banks of the Betwa River, famous for its magnificent palaces, cenotaphs (Chhatris), and the unique Ram Raja Temple.
history: Founded in the 16th century by Bundela Rajput chief Rudra Pratap Singh. It served as the capital of the Bundelkhand state.
famousFor: Jehangir Mahal, Ram Raja Temple, and Royal Chhatris.
